title: Budget and prune context
description: Establish a token budget and a deterministic pruning/summarization policy that preserves instructions and recent state.
body: Steps: 1. Measure the per-turn token budget against the model's window with output headroom. 2. Classify content: system instructions, recent turns, older history, tool results. 3. Define a deterministic policy: always keep instructions and the most recent turns, summarize or evict the rest. 4. Verify the assembled context fits before each call. 5. Add a long-run test that stays within the window. Rollback point: before changing what gets evicted. Validation: a long run never overflows and instructions survive pruning.
